mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM sys_users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 0, 1
SELECT id, username, real_name, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM sys_users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_users SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
